title: Streaming Intermediate Results
constraints: Each workflow step must emit its result as soon as it completes, before the next step starts
The user must see intermediate outputs in real time, not just the final answer
The streaming must work with at least 3 sequential steps
You may not buffer all results and print them at the end
hints: In LangGraph, use stream_mode='updates' or stream_mode='values' to get state updates after each node executes
Each node should update a specific state key so the stream consumer can identify which step just completed
In LangChain, use callbacks or streaming handlers to emit results as each chain step finishes

starterCode.langgraph:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage
import time

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Only the final result is shown — user waits with no feedback
# TODO: Stream intermediate results so the user sees progress after each step
def research_topic(topic: str) -> str:
    outline = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="Create a brief research outline for this topic. List 3-4 key areas to investigate."),
        HumanMessage(content=topic),
    ])

    research = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="Based on this outline, write a detailed research summary for each area."),
        HumanMessage(content=outline.content),
    ])

    report = llm.invoke([
        SystemMessage(content="Turn this research into a polished final report with an introduction and conclusion."),
        HumanMessage(content=research.content),
    ])

    # BUG: User only sees the final report after waiting for all 3 steps
    return report.content

result = research_topic("The impact of AI on healthcare")
print(result)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Only the final result is shown — user waits with no feedback
# TODO: Stream intermediate results so the user sees progress after each step
outliner = Agent(
    role="Outliner",
    goal="Create a research outline",
    backstory="Create a brief research outline. List 3-4 key areas to investigate.",
    llm=llm,
)

researcher = Agent(
    role="Researcher",
    goal="Write detailed research summaries",
    backstory="Write a detailed research summary for each area in the outline.",
    llm=llm,
)

reporter = Agent(
    role="Reporter",
    goal="Write a polished final report",
    backstory="Turn research into a polished final report with an introduction and conclusion.",
    llm=llm,
)

outline_task = Task(
    description="Create a research outline for: The impact of AI on healthcare",
    expected_output="A list of 3-4 key areas to investigate",
    agent=outliner,
)

research_task = Task(
    description="Write detailed research for each area",
    expected_output="Detailed research summary for each area",
    agent=researcher,
    context=[outline_task],
)

report_task = Task(
    description="Write a polished final report",
    expected_output="A polished report with introduction and conclusion",
    agent=reporter,
    context=[research_task],
)

# BUG: User only sees the final report after waiting for all 3 steps
crew = Crew(
    agents=[outliner, researcher, reporter],
    tasks=[outline_task, research_task, report_task],
    process=Process.sequential,
)

result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Only the final result is shown — user waits with no feedback
# TODO: Stream intermediate results so the user sees progress after each step
def research_topic(topic: str) -> str:
    outliner = Agent(
        name="Outliner",
        instructions="Create a brief research outline for this topic. List 3-4 key areas to investigate.",
    )
    outline_result = Runner.run_sync(outliner, topic)

    researcher = Agent(
        name="Researcher",
        instructions="Based on this outline, write a detailed research summary for each area.",
    )
    research_result = Runner.run_sync(researcher, outline_result.final_output)

    reporter = Agent(
        name="Reporter",
        instructions="Turn this research into a polished final report with an introduction and conclusion.",
    )
    report_result = Runner.run_sync(reporter, research_result.final_output)

    # BUG: User only sees the final report after waiting for all 3 steps
    return report_result.final_output

result = research_topic("The impact of AI on healthcare")
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Emits results per step
evaluationCriteria.description: Each workflow step emits its output as soon as it completes

evaluationCriteria.label: Real-time visibility
evaluationCriteria.description: The user can see intermediate outputs before the final result is ready

evaluationCriteria.label: Step identification
evaluationCriteria.description: Each streamed update identifies which step produced it
